nasb.text: Arise, lift up the lad, and hold him by the hand, for I will make a great nation of him.”

esv.text: Up! Lift up the boy, and hold him fast with your hand, for I will make him into a great nation.”

cnv.text: 起來，扶起孩子，盡力保護他；因為我要使他成為大國。”

ccb.text: 你去扶他起来，安慰他，我必使他成为大国。”

csbs.text: 起来！扶起这少年，用手扶持他，因为我要使他成为一个大国。”
